_comments.purpose: TypeScript configuration specifically for application code (excluding tests)
_comments.description: Extends the main tsconfig with production build settings
_comments.extends: Inherits from the main tsconfig.json in the same directory
_comments.outDir: Compiled JavaScript output directory for build artifacts

types.node: Node.js type definitions for global objects and modules
types.cssmodule: Type definitions for CSS Module imports (.module.scss files)
types.image: Type definitions for image imports (PNG, SVG, etc.)
types.vite/client: Vite-specific types for HMR and import.meta

_comments.exclude: Excludes all test files from production builds
_comments.include: Includes all source files in TypeScript and JavaScript formats
